name: Ansell Limited
analysis: ANN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 20% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$29.1600. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$29.7600, stop A$26.6904, target A$32.9330 (1.03:1) — then trail it.
